metadata.description: Global B2B Regulatory Compliance Risk Dataset for API Consumption.
metadata.purpose: To calculate Estimated Maximum Financial Loss (EMFL) and risk exposure scores.

max_fine_details.basis: Global turnover or €20M, whichever is higher.

estimated_loss_range.note: Includes litigation costs and mandatory notification expenses.

risk_cases.root_cause: Lack of robust PII Masking protocols.

risk_cases.regulation: HIPAA (Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act)
risk_cases.violation_type: Unauthorized Disclosure of Protected Health Information (PHI)

estimated_loss_range.note: Includes civil lawsuit settlements and regulatory fines.

risk_cases.root_cause: Insecure data transfer/storage outside compliance boundaries.

risk_cases.violation_type: Failure to Obtain Opt-Out Consent/Right to Know Violation

max_fine_details.basis: $2,500 per non-intentional violation; $7,500 per intentional violation.

risk_cases.root_cause: Insufficient transparency in data collection mechanisms.

risk_cases.violation_type: Failure to Implement Technical Documentation & Risk Assessment (High-Risk System)

max_fine_details.basis: Potentially up to 35% of global annual turnover (Highest possible penalty).

estimated_loss_range.note: Worst-case scenario includes market exit and systemic shutdown.

risk_cases.root_cause: Lack of mandatory human oversight and explainability (XAI).

provenance.source: Researcher 개인 메모리 - [2026-05-28] 관련 규제 위반 데이터셋

schema_notes: The 'severity_weighting' score (0.1 to 1.0) should be used alongside the estimated loss range in the risk calculation API endpoint.
